name: CSC DomainManager
description: Connects to CSC Domain manager platform using CSC Domain manager API services

parameters.name: selector
parameters.description: The attribute of the domain to search with. For example, "qualifiedDomainName=like='example\*'" or "nameservers=in=('dns1.mydns.com', 'dns2.mydns.com')"

parameters.name: operator
parameters.description: Search operators used to clarify selector. == for Equals, =gt= for Greater Than, =le= for Less Than or Equal To, etc

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value to compare to selector based on operator. For example, "filter=qualifiedDomainName=={value}"

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Specify how results should be sorted: Ex: propertyName,(desc|asc)

parameters.name: custom
parameters.description: For custom or more complex searches that use joiner values

actions.name: Get Specific Domain
actions.description: Get domain data by qualified domain name

parameters.name: fqdn
parameters.description: Qualified domain name

actions.name: Check Domain Available
actions.description: Check registration availability for one or more domain names

parameters.name: fqdn
parameters.description: Values of one or more domains to check for availability, separated by a comma. Max 50 domains in one query

parameters.name: qualifieddomainname
parameters.description: Domain to register

parameters.name: businessunit
parameters.description: Business Unit abbreviation to use in domain registration

parameters.name: term
parameters.description: Term, in months, to register domain. Defaults to 12 months

parameters.name: brand
parameters.description: Brand name value to provide in domain registration. Defaults to empty string

parameters.name: registrantprofile
parameters.description: Value to list as whois contact. Must exist already in CSC or order will be incomplete

parameters.name: adminprofile
parameters.description: Value to list as whois contact. Must exist already in CSC or order will be incomplete

parameters.name: technicalprofile
parameters.description: Value to list as whois contact. Must exist already in CSC or order will be incomplete

parameters.name: nameservers
parameters.description: Comma-separated string of name servers to use in registration. Only required if there is no order template mapped to your bearer token

parameters.name: dnstype
parameters.description: Type of DNS configuration. Defaults to CSC_BASIC

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Notes to provide in registration payload. Defaults to "Registered by Security Automation" if not provided

parameters.name: notificationsenabled
parameters.description: Whether or not email notifications are enabled for domain registration. Defaults to False

parameters.name: additionalnotificationemails
parameters.description: Comma-separated string of email addresses to add as receivers of notifications related to this domain

parameters.name: redactpublicwhois
parameters.description: Whether to anonymize public whois info. Defaults to False

actions.name: Get Order Status
actions.description: Get one or more orders for a purchase request for a particular fqdn

parameters.name: fqdn
parameters.description: The domain which was purchased and is the subject of the query to see the purchase status
